category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a network traffic sniffer; official GitHub README describes network troubleshooting and traffic analysis.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub README identify the project as sniffer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes introduction, installation, usage flags, hotkeys, and performance notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/chenjiandongx/sniffer, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics and usage describe a TUI packet/traffic sniffer using libpcap/gopacket.
